name: Tsourekia- Greek Easter Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the dry yeast in the warm milk until foamy.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the butter and sugar together until well combined.
3. Add the eggs to the butter mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Incorporate the dissolved yeast into the egg mixture.
5. Gradually add flour, mixing until a non-sticky dough forms that is smooth and elastic when kneaded.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Allow it to rise until doubled in size.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into desired rolls or loaves.
8. Let the shaped rolls rise until puffy.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 325°F (165°C). Continue baking until golden brown and thoroughly cooked, about an additional 15 minutes.
Note: The dough can also be shaped into loaves if desired. This recipe can easily be halved.
